mission: Audits observability, incident playbooks and runbooks.

telemetrySignals.purpose: Detect active, stale or mismatched factory state before a worker starts.
telemetrySignals.privacy: Workspace-local process metadata only; no prompt or customer payloads.
telemetrySignals.threshold: id, pid, workspace, startedAt, heartbeatAt and mode are present, and heartbeatAt does not precede startedAt.

telemetrySignals.purpose: Track structure, agent contracts and factory acceptance gates.
telemetrySignals.privacy: Sanitized artifact status and evidence references only.

telemetrySignals.purpose: Track prompt depth, runtime prompt parity and prompt growth budget.
telemetrySignals.privacy: Prompt metrics and detector results only; raw credentials are blocked.
telemetrySignals.threshold: pass=true with no secret or local-path detector findings.

telemetrySignals.purpose: Track Codex, Claude, GitHub Copilot and LangChain adapter drift.
telemetrySignals.privacy: Runtime file references and normalized drift status only.
telemetrySignals.threshold: pass=true with max unexplained drift equal to 0.

telemetrySignals.purpose: Summarize local Codex runtime incidents without exposing raw log bodies.
telemetrySignals.privacy: Aggregated incident classes only; no raw logs are included in prompts or reports.
telemetrySignals.threshold: Only sanitized incident ids, counts and remediation pointers are referenced.

incidentPlaybooks.detect: State lock missing, workspace mismatch, timestamp inversion or heartbeat older than the configured stale threshold.
response: Pause new factory starts in this workspace.
Inspect .codex-loop/run.lock.json and current worker ownership.
Create a rollback snapshot before any declared-file edits.
Run python tools/validate_copilot_factory.py.
Read the failing report issue list before changing code.
Scope the fix to declared files or documented factory roots.
Re-run the validation command that produced the regression.
Record residual risk if a non-product gate is intentionally not applicable.

incidentPlaybooks.detect: Codex, Claude, GitHub Copilot or LangChain diverges from the shared spec or trace map.
response: Treat dist/copilots/<copilot>/shared/spec.json as canonical.
Repair all runtime adapters or record an explicit unsupported drift.
Run python tools/validate_runtime_equivalence.py.
Keep generated/runtime-injection-map.json as trace evidence.

incidentPlaybooks.detect: A required telemetry signal source is missing or no longer resolves to an artifact.
response: Confirm whether the signal is local factory evidence or product-specific evidence.
Restore the local source or mark product-specific evidence as residual risk.
Update this contract and the scorecard in the same patch.
Run python tools/validate_copilot_factory.py.

incidentPlaybooks.detect: A report, runbook or prompt includes raw logs, credentials, local personal paths or customer data.
response: Stop propagation of the affected artifact.
Replace raw values with placeholders or sanitized evidence references.
Run python tools/validate_prompt_quality.py.
Keep only local defensive engineering context in follow-up notes.
